findings.detail: Fields [1, 2] of %class.MTRand occupy cache-line bucket 78 (offset 4992-5055B) and are both written from thread-reachable code.
findings.fix: Split hot fields of %class.MTRand into a separate struct, or insert padding to push fields to different cache lines.

findings.detail: Variable-index store into shared scalar array ((pointer), element i32 = 4B) from thread function '_Z13RebuildGridMTi'. 16 elements share each 64B cache line; thread-id-indexed writes to adjacent elements cause line ping-pong.
findings.fix: Give each thread a 64B-aligned slot: stride indices by 16, use a padded per-thread struct, or allocate with aligned_alloc(64, ...).

findings.detail: Variable-index array access into %union.pthread_mutex_t (size=40B < 64B). Function '_Z15ComputeForcesMTi' indexes array of %union.pthread_mutex_t by thread id -- adjacent elements (1 fit per 64B cache line) share a cache line. Concurrent writes from different threads cause line ping-pong.
findings.fix: Pad %union.pthread_mutex_t to 64 bytes: add 'char padding[64 - sizeof(struct)]' or annotate with '__attribute__((aligned(64)))' / 'alignas(64)'.

findings.detail: Globals @_ZZ5pgainlP6PointsdPliP16parsec_barrier_tE20gl_cost_of_opening_x (size 8B) and @_ZZ7pspeedyP6PointsfPliP16parsec_barrier_tE1i are each smaller than 64B and are written from different thread-reachable functions (_Z5pgainlP6PointsdPliP16parsec_barrier_t, _Z7pspeedyP6PointsfPliP16parsec_barrier_t). If the linker places them in the same cache line, concurrent writes cause placement-dependent false sharing.
findings.fix: Separate @_ZZ5pgainlP6PointsdPliP16parsec_barrier_tE20gl_cost_of_opening_x and @_ZZ7pspeedyP6PointsfPliP16parsec_barrier_tE1i onto distinct cache lines (alignas(64) on each, or group thread-private state).
